summary: VYLNAX PRO iteration 2 tested end-to-end. Backend: 23/23 pytest tests PASSED (100%) covering auth guards, session/me/role, patients CRUD, medications CRUD, schedule computation, intake -> schedule/reports reflection, day/week/month reports, device shape, SOS, NEW /api/med-database (default list + name + category search + empty search) and NEW /api/assistant (chat with Claude sonnet-4-6, ordered history, multi-turn coherence, DELETE clears history). Found and FIXED an ordering bug in backend/server.py where EMERGENT_LLM_KEY was read from os.environ BEFORE load_dotenv() ran, so the key from .env was never loaded (assistant returned 500 'LLM key not configured'). After fix and backend restart, assistant chat works and multi-turn context is preserved. Frontend: login screen (/login) renders correctly on 390x844 mobile viewport, no red-screen, no JS/console errors, 'Mit Google anmelden' button visible; Expo web bundle compiles cleanly (i.e. assistant.tsx, add-medication.tsx, device.tsx, pairing.tsx have no build/syntax errors). Google OAuth prevents authenticated UI automation as documented.
action_items: Consider adding an integration smoke test hook (backend endpoint) for a dev-only auth token bypass to enable authenticated UI automation in preview envs (currently Google OAuth blocks Playwright-driven flows for assistant/add-medication/device/pairing).
Optionally seed a default patient reminder in /api/patients response so /api/assistant/chat has meaningful medication context out-of-the-box.

Consider not persisting the assistant reply if send_message raises after the user message was constructed (currently a 502 will still leave user message unlogged since insert happens after reply succeeds -- this is fine as-is; no action needed).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py loaded EMERGENT_LLM_KEY via os.environ.get BEFORE load_dotenv() was called, causing assistant chat to fail with 500 in preview env where the var is only in backend/.env. Reordered to call load_dotenv() first.
server.py is ~575 lines -- still under 700 threshold, but assistant/med-db logic could be extracted into a separate module as feature set grows.
MongoDB _id is consistently excluded via projection {"_id": 0}. Good.
All /api routes are properly prefixed and auth-guarded via Depends(get_current_user).
Pydantic models validate all inputs. HTTPException codes (400/401/404/500/502) are correct and specific.
chat_messages history is sorted by created_at desc then reversed (line 506-507); works but could just be .sort('created_at', 1) directly.

success_rate.frontend: smoke-only: login screen renders, no errors

seed_data_creation: Test user + session inserted directly into MongoDB (bypasses Google OAuth). Auto-cleaned via pytest teardown. Test data prefixed with TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend auth is Google OAuth via Emergent; to test authenticated APIs, insert a synthetic user/session into MongoDB (test_database) as done in conftest.py::test_user_and_token. Backend base URL from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is set in /app/backend/.env and NOW loads correctly after load_dotenv ordering fix -- if you re-touch env, always `sudo supervisorctl restart backend` and wait ~8s for Cloudflare warm-up before hitting assistant endpoints (occasional first-hit 502 observed). Assistant model: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 via emergentintegrations.LlmChat (non-streaming send_message).
rca_of_issue: RCA: POST /api/assistant/chat returned 500 'LLM key not configured' in preview env. Reproduction: hit the endpoint with valid bearer -> observed 500. Root cause: server.py line 15 executed `EMERGENT_LLM_KEY = os.environ.get('EMERGENT_LLM_KEY', '')` at import time, BEFORE line 18 executed `load_dotenv(ROOT_DIR / '.env')`. Since the preview container did not export EMERGENT_LLM_KEY into the process environment (verified via /proc/<pid>/environ), the variable stayed empty. Mitigation: reordered so load_dotenv runs first, then os.environ.get reads the now-populated env. Retested: all 3 assistant tests pass (history empty -> chat -> multi-turn reply -> delete -> empty).
